name: Spice Cake
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup Skim Milk, or nonfat soy milk
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine dry ingredients.
2. In a small bowl, using a fork or wire whisk, mix egg whites (or substitute), milk, corn syrup, and vanilla.
3. Add the wet mixture to the flour mixture; stir until smooth.
4. Pour the batter into a sprayed 9-inch square pan.
5. Bake in a preheated oven at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 25 - 30 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Cool in the pan on a wire rack.
